requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — General Luminaire (MASM certification + MNS/IEC 60598-1)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——通用灯具（MASM 认证 + MNS/IEC 60598-1）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——通用燈具（MASM 認證 + MNS/IEC 60598-1）

summary.en: LED luminaires placed on the Mongolian market are subject to conformity certification administered by MASM (Mongolian Agency for Standardization and Metrology) for regulated products. The general luminaire safety standard is the Mongolian national standard MNS IEC 60598-1 (Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests), which adopts IEC 60598-1; particular requirements follow the relevant MNS IEC 60598-2 parts. Mongolia's grid is 220/380 V, 50 Hz — the same nominal voltage and frequency as China — so luminaires designed for the Chinese 220/380 V 50 Hz grid are electrically compatible without re-design. Certification typically requires test reports against the applicable MNS/IEC standard, product documentation, and is processed through a registered in-country importer. Verify the current MASM certified-product list and the exact MNS edition in force for luminaires before shipment.
summary.zh: 在蒙古市场投放的 LED 灯具，对受管制产品须接受 MASM（蒙古标准计量局）管理的合格认证。通用灯具安全标准为蒙古国家标准 MNS IEC 60598-1（灯具——第 1 部分：一般要求与试验），采用 IEC 60598-1；特殊要求遵循相关 MNS IEC 60598-2 各部分。蒙古电网为 220/380 V、50 Hz——与中国标称电压和频率相同——因此为中国 220/380 V 50 Hz 电网设计的灯具在电气上兼容，无需重新设计。认证通常须提供按适用 MNS/IEC 标准出具的检测报告及产品文件，并通过已登记的在地进口商办理。出货前请核查现行 MASM 认证产品清单及灯具适用的确切 MNS 版本。
summary.zht: 在蒙古市場投放的 LED 燈具，對受管制產品須接受 MASM（蒙古標準計量局）管理的合格認證。通用燈具安全標準為蒙古國家標準 MNS IEC 60598-1（燈具——第 1 部分：一般要求與試驗），採用 IEC 60598-1；特殊要求遵循相關 MNS IEC 60598-2 各部分。蒙古電網為 220/380 V、50 Hz——與中國標稱電壓和頻率相同——因此為中國 220/380 V 50 Hz 電網設計的燈具在電氣上兼容，無需重新設計。認證通常須提供按適用 MNS/IEC 標準出具的檢測報告及產品文件，並通過已登記的在地進口商辦理。出貨前請核查現行 MASM 認證產品清單及燈具適用的確切 MNS 版本。

standards_or_laws: MASM (Mongolian Agency for Standardization and Metrology) — conformity certification for regulated products
MNS IEC 60598-1 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests (adopts IEC 60598-1)

summary.en: China's current general luminaire safety standard is GB/T 7000.1-2023 (Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests), replacing GB 7000.1-2015 from 1 January 2026. The edition change also changed the designation from mandatory GB to recommended GB/T; CCC obligations for in-scope luminaires remain governed by the applicable CNCA rules rather than by the GB/T designation alone. CCC testing is conducted by CNCA-authorized laboratories. Both GB/T 7000.1 and Mongolia's MNS IEC 60598-1 derive from IEC 60598-1, so the technical content is broadly aligned, but CCC and MASM are separate, non-mutual conformity processes.
summary.zh: 中国现行通用灯具安全标准为 GB/T 7000.1-2023（灯具——第 1 部分：一般要求与试验），自 2026 年 1 月 1 日起取代 GB 7000.1-2015。此次换版也将标准属性由强制性 GB 调整为推荐性 GB/T；范围内灯具的 CCC 义务仍由适用的 CNCA 规则决定，而非仅由 GB/T 标识决定。CCC 检测由 CNCA 授权实验室进行。GB/T 7000.1 与蒙古 MNS IEC 60598-1 均源自 IEC 60598-1，技术内容基本一致，但 CCC 与 MASM 为各自独立、互不承认的合格评定流程。
summary.zht: 中國現行通用燈具安全標準為 GB/T 7000.1-2023（燈具——第 1 部分：一般要求與試驗），自 2026 年 1 月 1 日起取代 GB 7000.1-2015。此次換版也將標準屬性由強制性 GB 調整為推薦性 GB/T；範圍內燈具的 CCC 義務仍由適用的 CNCA 規則決定，而非僅由 GB/T 標識決定。CCC 檢測由 CNCA 授權實驗室進行。GB/T 7000.1 與蒙古 MNS IEC 60598-1 均源自 IEC 60598-1，技術內容基本一致，但 CCC 與 MASM 為各自獨立、互不承認的合格評定流程。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 7000.1-2023 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests (replaces GB 7000.1-2015 from 1 January 2026)
CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires

gap.en: Because both China and Mongolia base luminaire safety on IEC 60598-1, the underlying technical requirements are largely aligned, and the shared 220/380 V 50 Hz grid means no electrical re-design for voltage. The practical gap is procedural: CCC certification and CCC test reports are not recognised for Mongolian market access — MASM conformity certification must be obtained separately, typically via a registered in-country importer. Test reports should be against the MNS IEC 60598 series; an IEC CB Scheme test report and certificate may streamline acceptance where MASM accepts CB results, but confirm this with MASM. Verify the exact list of luminaire categories subject to mandatory MASM certification (versus voluntary), the required documentation language (Mongolian where stipulated), and importer-registration obligations before shipment.
gap.zh: 由于中蒙两国灯具安全均以 IEC 60598-1 为基础，底层技术要求基本一致，且共享 220/380 V 50 Hz 电网意味着电压方面无需重新设计。实际差距在程序层面：CCC 认证及 CCC 检测报告不被蒙古市场准入所认可——须另行取得 MASM 合格认证，通常经由已登记的在地进口商办理。检测报告应按 MNS IEC 60598 系列出具；在 MASM 接受 CB 结果的情况下，IEC CB 体系检测报告及证书可能有助于加快受理，但须向 MASM 确认。出货前请核实须强制 MASM 认证（相对于自愿）的灯具类别确切清单、所需文件语言（按规定使用蒙古语）及进口商登记义务。
gap.zht: 由於中蒙兩國燈具安全均以 IEC 60598-1 為基礎，底層技術要求基本一致，且共享 220/380 V 50 Hz 電網意味著電壓方面無需重新設計。實際差距在程序層面：CCC 認證及 CCC 檢測報告不被蒙古市場准入所認可——須另行取得 MASM 合格認證，通常經由已登記的在地進口商辦理。檢測報告應按 MNS IEC 60598 系列出具；在 MASM 接受 CB 結果的情況下，IEC CB 體系檢測報告及證書可能有助於加快受理，但須向 MASM 確認。出貨前請核實須強制 MASM 認證（相對於自願）的燈具類別確切清單、所需文件語言（按規定使用蒙古語）及進口商登記義務。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (regulated products) — MASM conformity certification against MNS IEC 60598-1 required for regulated luminaires before Mongolian market placement; confirm exact certified-product scope with MASM
mandatory_status.cn: CCC mandatory where the luminaire remains within CNCA-C10-01 scope; the general luminaire safety standard changed from mandatory GB 7000.1-2015 to recommended GB/T 7000.1-2023 from 1 January 2026

source.publisher: MASM — Mongolian Agency for Standardization and Metrology

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED luminaire electrical safety for Mongolia is assessed through MASM conformity certification against MNS IEC 60598-1 (adopting IEC 60598-1). The technical base is shared with China's GB/T 7000.1-2023 (both IEC 60598-1 derived) and the 220/380 V 50 Hz grid matches China, so no voltage re-design is needed. However, CCC certification is not recognised for Mongolian access — MASM certification via a registered importer is a separate step. A CB Scheme report may assist where accepted. Verify the exact certified-product list, MNS edition, and importer obligations with MASM before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 蒙古的 LED 灯具电气安全通过 MASM 按 MNS IEC 60598-1（采用 IEC 60598-1）的合格认证评定。其技术基础与中国 GB/T 7000.1-2023 相同（均源自 IEC 60598-1），且 220/380 V 50 Hz 电网与中国一致，故无需进行电压重新设计。但 CCC 认证不被蒙古准入所认可——经登记进口商办理的 MASM 认证为独立步骤。在受理接受的情况下，CB 体系报告可能有所帮助。出货前请向 MASM 核实确切的认证产品清单、MNS 版本及进口商义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 蒙古的 LED 燈具電氣安全通過 MASM 按 MNS IEC 60598-1（採用 IEC 60598-1）的合格認證評定。其技術基礎與中國 GB/T 7000.1-2023 相同（均源自 IEC 60598-1），且 220/380 V 50 Hz 電網與中國一致，故無需進行電壓重新設計。但 CCC 認證不被蒙古准入所認可——經登記進口商辦理的 MASM 認證為獨立步驟。在受理接受的情況下，CB 體系報告可能有所幫助。出貨前請向 MASM 核實確切的認證產品清單、MNS 版本及進口商義務。

requirement_topic.zh: 自镇流 LED 灯安全（MNS/IEC 62560）
requirement_topic.zht: 自鎮流 LED 燈安全（MNS/IEC 62560）

summary.en: Self-ballasted LED lamps (LED bulbs with integrated control gear, for general lighting) intended for Mongolia are assessed for safety against the Mongolian national standard MNS IEC 62560 (Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services with supply voltages > 50 V — Safety specifications), which adopts IEC 62560. It covers interchangeability, protection against electric shock, insulation resistance and dielectric strength, mechanical strength of the cap, thermal endurance, and resistance to heat and fire. Lamps are designed for 220/380 V, 50 Hz, matching China's grid. MASM conformity certification applies to regulated lamp products and is typically obtained through a registered in-country importer.
summary.zh: 面向蒙古的自镇流 LED 灯（集成控制装置的通用照明 LED 灯泡）按蒙古国家标准 MNS IEC 62560（供电电压 > 50 V 的普通照明用自镇流 LED 灯——安全要求）评定安全，该标准采用 IEC 62560。其涵盖互换性、防触电、绝缘电阻和介电强度、灯头机械强度、热耐久性及耐热耐火性。灯具按 220/380 V、50 Hz 设计，与中国电网相符。MASM 合格认证适用于受管制灯类产品，通常经由已登记的在地进口商取得。
summary.zht: 面向蒙古的自鎮流 LED 燈（集成控制裝置的通用照明 LED 燈泡）按蒙古國家標準 MNS IEC 62560（供電電壓 > 50 V 的普通照明用自鎮流 LED 燈——安全要求）評定安全，該標準採用 IEC 62560。其涵蓋互換性、防觸電、絕緣電阻和介電強度、燈頭機械強度、熱耐久性及耐熱耐火性。燈具按 220/380 V、50 Hz 設計，與中國電網相符。MASM 合格認證適用於受管制燈類產品，通常經由已登記的在地進口商取得。

standards_or_laws: MNS IEC 62560 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services with supply voltages > 50 V — Safety specifications (adopts IEC 62560)
MASM — conformity certification for regulated lamp products

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 24906-2010 (Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services with supply voltages > 50 V — Safety requirements), which is technically aligned with IEC 62560. Self-ballasted LED lamps in the Chinese market may be subject to CCC where in scope, with testing by CNCA-authorized laboratories. The IEC 62560 base is shared with Mongolia's MNS IEC 62560, so technical requirements broadly align, but CCC and MASM remain separate conformity processes with no mutual recognition.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 24906-2010（普通照明用 50 V 以上自镇流 LED 灯——安全要求），技术上与 IEC 62560 对齐。中国市场的自镇流 LED 灯在适用范围内可能须取得 CCC，由 CNCA 授权实验室检测。IEC 62560 基础与蒙古 MNS IEC 62560 一致，故技术要求基本一致，但 CCC 与 MASM 仍为各自独立、互不承认的合格评定流程。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 24906-2010（普通照明用 50 V 以上自鎮流 LED 燈——安全要求），技術上與 IEC 62560 對齊。中國市場的自鎮流 LED 燈在適用範圍內可能須取得 CCC，由 CNCA 授權實驗室檢測。IEC 62560 基礎與蒙古 MNS IEC 62560 一致，故技術要求基本一致，但 CCC 與 MASM 仍為各自獨立、互不承認的合格評定流程。

standards_or_laws: GB 24906-2010 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services with supply voltages > 50 V — Safety requirements (SAC/SAMR, aligned with IEC 62560)
CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules (where in scope for lamps)

gap.en: Both GB 24906 and Mongolia's MNS IEC 62560 derive from IEC 62560, so the lamp-safety technical requirements are largely aligned and the shared 220/380 V 50 Hz grid removes any voltage re-design. The gap is procedural: a Chinese CCC certificate or GB 24906 test report does not by itself satisfy Mongolian market access — MASM conformity certification against MNS IEC 62560 is required for regulated lamps, generally via a registered in-country importer. Where MASM accepts IEC CB Scheme results, a CB test report plus certificate referencing IEC 62560 may streamline acceptance — confirm with MASM. Verify which lamp categories are mandatory versus voluntary under the current MASM scope, and the required documentation and language.
gap.zh: GB 24906 与蒙古 MNS IEC 62560 均源自 IEC 62560，故灯安全技术要求基本一致，且共享 220/380 V 50 Hz 电网消除了电压重新设计的需要。差距在程序层面：中国 CCC 证书或 GB 24906 检测报告本身不满足蒙古市场准入——受管制灯须按 MNS IEC 62560 取得 MASM 合格认证，通常经由已登记的在地进口商办理。在 MASM 接受 IEC CB 体系结果的情况下，引用 IEC 62560 的 CB 检测报告及证书可能有助于加快受理——须向 MASM 确认。请核实在现行 MASM 范围下哪些灯类别为强制（相对于自愿），以及所需文件及语言。
gap.zht: GB 24906 與蒙古 MNS IEC 62560 均源自 IEC 62560，故燈安全技術要求基本一致，且共享 220/380 V 50 Hz 電網消除了電壓重新設計的需要。差距在程序層面：中國 CCC 證書或 GB 24906 檢測報告本身不滿足蒙古市場准入——受管制燈須按 MNS IEC 62560 取得 MASM 合格認證，通常經由已登記的在地進口商辦理。在 MASM 接受 IEC CB 體系結果的情況下，引用 IEC 62560 的 CB 檢測報告及證書可能有助於加快受理——須向 MASM 確認。請核實在現行 MASM 範圍下哪些燈類別為強制（相對於自願），以及所需文件及語言。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (regulated products) — MASM conformity certification against MNS IEC 62560 required for regulated self-ballasted LED lamps; confirm exact scope and route with MASM
mandatory_status.cn: CCC where in scope — GB 24906-2010 is the applicable lamp safety standard; CCC may apply to in-scope self-ballasted LED lamps

source.publisher: MASM — Mongolian Agency for Standardization and Metrology

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Self-ballasted LED lamp safety for Mongolia is assessed against MNS IEC 62560 (adopting IEC 62560) under MASM conformity certification. The technical base is shared with China's GB 24906-2010 and the 220/380 V 50 Hz grid matches China. A Chinese CCC certificate is not recognised for Mongolian access — MASM certification via a registered importer is required for regulated lamps, with an IEC CB report potentially assisting acceptance. Confirm mandatory-versus-voluntary scope and documentation requirements with MASM before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 蒙古的自镇流 LED 灯安全在 MASM 合格认证下按 MNS IEC 62560（采用 IEC 62560）评定。其技术基础与中国 GB 24906-2010 相同，且 220/380 V 50 Hz 电网与中国一致。中国 CCC 证书不被蒙古准入所认可——受管制灯须经登记进口商办理 MASM 认证，IEC CB 报告可能有助于受理。出货前请向 MASM 确认强制与自愿范围及文件要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 蒙古的自鎮流 LED 燈安全在 MASM 合格認證下按 MNS IEC 62560（採用 IEC 62560）評定。其技術基礎與中國 GB 24906-2010 相同，且 220/380 V 50 Hz 電網與中國一致。中國 CCC 證書不被蒙古准入所認可——受管制燈須經登記進口商辦理 MASM 認證，IEC CB 報告可能有助於受理。出貨前請向 MASM 確認強制與自願範圍及文件要求。
